title: Causality and Partial Ordering of Events in a Distributed System
description: A diagram illustrating the happens-before relationship (->) between events across three processes (P1, P2, P3). It shows internal events, message send/receive events, and how these relationships create a partial ordering, which is fundamental to logical clocks and global state.
elements: Process P1 timeline with events a1, a2, a3
Process P2 timeline with events b1, b2, b3
Process P3 timeline with events c1, c2, c3
relationships: The transitive closure of -> establishes a partial order (causality)
